title: API connect_boards problem on create
excerpt:
I tried the "\"connect_boards\" : {\"item_ids\" : [\"__connected_board_item_id__\"]}" as the column_values when creating a subitem but the created subitem does not have value for that column. 
What is the correct format …

posts.author: jeibbiej (John Bautista)
posts.cookedHtml:
I tried the "\"connect_boards\" : {\"item_ids\" : [\"__connected_board_item_id__\"]}" as the column_values when creating a subitem but the created subitem does not have value for that column.

What is the correct format for that?
